message:
feat: overhaul robot mail-check, complete config system coverage

Robot mail-check:
- Aggregate messages across all project agents when --mail-agent omitted
  (ListProjectAgents + per-agent FetchInbox with deduplication by message ID)
- Client-side filtering for thread, read/unread status, and until-date
  with automatic backfill when filters require it
- Overfetch by +1 to detect HasMore for pagination
- Canonicalize flags: deprecate --cass-since/--cass-limit in favor of
  shared --since/--limit (default limit changed from 10 to 20)
- Validate negative limit/offset values
- Add omitempty to optional pointer fields in JSON output

Config system completeness:
- Extend Print/GetValue/Diff/Validate to cover all remaining sections:
  scanner (thresholds, tools, beads, notifications), accounts (codex,
  gemini), rotation (auto_trigger, auto_initiate, dashboard, accounts),
  notifications (primary, fallback, routing, filebox, webhook headers),
  resilience (rate_limit, crash_threshold), context_rotation, gemini_setup,
  CASS (duplicates, search, tui)
- Switch Diff from fmt.Sprintf("%v") to reflect.DeepEqual for correct
  map/slice comparison
- Sort map keys in Print for deterministic output
- Add ValidateAccountsConfig, ValidateRotationConfig,
  ValidateGeminiSetupConfig, ValidateScannerConfig validators
- Change ProjectIntegrations fields from bool to *bool for tri-state
  merge semantics (set-true, set-false, omitted)

Robot output improvements:
- History pagination summary shows filter-aware "Showing X of Y" counts
- Capabilities registry updated for mail-check canonical flags
- Help text mentions YYYY-MM-DD format for --since

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 	}
 }
 
+func TestMergeConfig_ProjectIntegrationToggles(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	global := Default()
+	global.AgentMail.Enabled = true
+	global.CASS.Enabled = true
+	global.Memory.Enabled = true
+
+	disable := false
+	project := &ProjectConfig{
+		Integrations: ProjectIntegrations{
+			AgentMail: &disable,
+			CASS:      &disable,
+			CM:        &disable,
+		},
+	}
+
+	result := MergeConfig(global, project, t.TempDir())
+	if result.AgentMail.Enabled {
+		t.Error("AgentMail.Enabled should be false after project override")
+	}
+	if result.CASS.Enabled {
+		t.Error("CASS.Enabled should be false after project override")
+	}
+	if result.Memory.Enabled {
+		t.Error("Memory.Enabled should be false after project override")
+	}
+}
+
+func TestMergeConfig_ProjectIntegrationOmitPreservesGlobal(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	global := Default()
+	global.AgentMail.Enabled = true
+	global.CASS.Enabled = true
+	global.Memory.Enabled = true
+
+	project := &ProjectConfig{
+		Integrations: ProjectIntegrations{},
+	}
+
+	result := MergeConfig(global, project, t.TempDir())
+	if !result.AgentMail.Enabled {
+		t.Error("AgentMail.Enabled should remain true when project omits agent_mail")
+	}
+	if !result.CASS.Enabled {
+		t.Error("CASS.Enabled should remain true when project omits cass")
+	}
+	if !result.Memory.Enabled {
+		t.Error("Memory.Enabled should remain true when project omits cm")
+	}
+}
+

@@ -1527,20 +1527,21 @@ func buildCommandRegistry() []RobotCommandInfo {
 			Description: "Check Agent Mail inboxes with filtering by project, agent, thread, or urgency.",
 			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
 				{Name: "mail-project", Flag: "--mail-project", Type: "string", Required: true, Description: "Project name for the mail check"},
-				{Name: "mail-agent", Flag: "--mail-agent", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter to a specific agent inbox"},
+				{Name: "mail-agent", Flag: "--mail-agent", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter to a specific agent inbox; omit to aggregate project agents"},
 				{Name: "thread", Flag: "--thread", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter to a specific thread"},
 				{Name: "mail-status", Flag: "--mail-status", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter by read status: read, unread, all"},
 				{Name: "include-bodies", Flag: "--include-bodies", Type: "bool", Required: false, Description: "Include full message bodies"},
 				{Name: "urgent-only", Flag: "--urgent-only", Type: "bool", Required: false, Description: "Only show urgent/high-priority messages"},
 				{Name: "mail-verbose", Flag: "--mail-verbose", Type: "bool", Required: false, Description: "Include extra diagnostic detail"},
-				{Name: "limit", Flag: "--limit", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "10", Description: "Max messages to return (alias: --cass-limit)"},
+				{Name: "limit", Flag: "--limit", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "20", Description: "Max messages to return (deprecated alias: --cass-limit)"},
 				{Name: "mail-offset", Flag: "--mail-offset", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "0", Description: "Pagination offset"},
-				{Name: "cass-since", Flag: "--cass-since", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter to messages since a relative duration or date"},
+				{Name: "since", Flag: "--since", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter to messages since date (YYYY-MM-DD; deprecated alias: --cass-since)"},
 				{Name: "mail-until", Flag: "--mail-until", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter to messages before a date"},
 			},
 			Examples: []string{
 				"ntm --robot-mail-check --mail-project=myproject",
 				"ntm --robot-mail-check --mail-project=myproject --mail-agent=cc_1 --urgent-only",
+				"ntm --robot-mail-check --mail-project=myproject --since=2025-01-01 --limit=20",
 			},
 		},
 		{
